title: For UAS Developers

preview.teaser: A unique complex for conducting reliable aerodynamic testing of unmanned aerial systems at all development stages.

subtitle: FLOWTECH WIND TUNNEL — a unique complex for conducting reliable aerodynamic testing

1.title: Interference Effects
1.description: Detection of unaccounted interference effects in model airflow

2.title: Structural Integrity
2.description: Testing the strength and rigidity of aircraft structures

3.title: Design Errors
3.description: Detection of design errors and flight mode selection issues before full-scale testing

4.title: Solution Verification
4.description: Confirmation of chosen structural and aerodynamic design decisions

5.title: UAV Characteristics
5.description: Verification of declared flight performance characteristics of unmanned aircraft
